summary: Tested AI Report Generation with Web Scraping for Market Prices. Backend API (POST /api/inspections/{id}/generate-ai-report) is fully functional with 14/14 tests passing. Web scraping integration works correctly, fetching prices from CarDekho and using fallback depreciation estimation when needed. Market price research data is stored in inspection.market_price_research field. Frontend LiveProgressModal correctly displays market avg and sources count when data is available.

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Web scraper implementation is solid with proper fallback to depreciation-based estimation
Market price research data is correctly stored in MongoDB inspection document
Frontend correctly displays market avg and sources count below market value inputs
AI report generation uses GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations.llm.chat

success_rate.frontend: 100% - LiveProgressModal working, AI Analysis section displays correctly

seed_data_creation: Used existing test inspections: test-insp-c2296e69 (Hyundai Creta) and test-insp-781768ac (Honda City) with AI reports already generated
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Report Generation with Web Scraping is fully implemented and working. Test inspections test-insp-c2296e69 (Hyundai Creta) and test-insp-781768ac (Honda City) have market_price_research data with sources from CarDekho. Market prices are in realistic range (6.5-8.25L for Creta, 4.77L avg for City). Frontend displays market avg and sources count in LiveProgressModal when inspection has market_price_research data.

features: Fetches market prices via web scraping
Returns ai_insights with overall_rating, market_value, assessment_summary, condition_ratings

web_scraping.price_range: Realistic prices in 3-15L range for typical used cars

features: AI Analysis section with Generate/Regenerate button
Market avg display with sources count (when market_price_research available)

frontend_tests.test: Open Live Progress modal via Live button
AI Report generation via button click
